modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be distracting grammar usage and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User cannot log in due to sign-in method restrictions.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing an issue where they cannot log on to the system. They receive a message stating, “The sign-in method you are trying to use isn’t allowed.” This situation may require assistance from the network administrator to resolve the restrictions imposed by the Group Policy on Windows 10.
short_description: User cannot log in due to sign-in method restrictions.
description: The user is experiencing an issue where they cannot log on to the system. They receive a message stating, “The sign-in method you are trying to use isn’t allowed.” This situation may require assistance from the network administrator to resolve the restrictions imposed by the Group Policy on Windows 10.
